description: Machine-readable registry mapping source-cache docs to topic lanes and scope. Used for source-provenance governance and ownership tracking.

policy.ownership_note: Maintainer field is advisory; any contributor may update a source-cache doc when adding or repairing a cached artifact.

source_caches.scope: CVD simulation and daltonization algorithm papers (Brettel, Vienot, Machado, Stockman, cone-fundamental references)
Cognitive load, UX complexity, adaptive learning, and GATE-006 cognitive-validator backing sources
Broader color-vision computation and CVD mechanism papers that span multiple impairment lanes
ADHD visual processing, autism accessibility, dyslexia research
Photosensitive epilepsy research and seizure-trigger normative standards (ITU-R BT.1702, Harding test)
Stereoblindness prevalence, depth-cue research, XR accessibility, and motion-parallax sources
Multi-axis vision conditions including BCM, contrast sensitivity, low vision, nystagmus, and visual field loss
